summary: Tested XRP + SOL addition to live price ticker and landing page layout. Backend API returns all 4 coins (BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL) correctly sorted by market cap. Frontend ticker displays all 4 coins on both desktop and mobile. Z-index stacking verified: navbar (z-50) > ticker (z-40) > hero (z-auto). All CTAs navigate correctly. Dashboard renders without errors.
passed_tests: GET /api/market/live-prices returns 200 with BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL
GET /api/live-prices (alias) returns same 4 coins
Each price object has correct fields: id, symbol, name, price, change_24h, volume_24h
Prices sorted by market cap: BTC (idx 0), ETH (idx 1), XRP (idx 2), SOL (idx 3)
Response includes timestamp and source fields
BTC price data valid (id='bitcoin', name='Bitcoin', price > 0)
XRP price data valid (id='xrp', name='XRP', price > 0)
SOL price data valid (id='solana', name='Solana', price > 0)
Desktop (1920x1080): Price ticker visible at y=92, height=45
Desktop: Ticker shows all 4 coins (BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL)
Desktop: Ticker z-index is 40
Desktop: Hero section visible at y=137 (below ticker)
Desktop: Hero title visible
Desktop: CTA 'Join Free Beta Access' visible and clickable
Desktop: CTA 'View Live Metrics' visible and clickable
Desktop: Live Metrics Terminal visible
Desktop: Trust bar visible
Mobile (390x844): Price ticker visible at y=92
Mobile: Ticker shows all 4 coins (BTC, ETH visible, XRP, SOL via horizontal scroll)
Mobile: Hero section visible at y=137
Mobile: Hero title visible
Mobile: CTAs visible
CTA 'View Live Metrics' navigates to /leaderboard
CTA 'Join Free Beta Access' navigates to /register
Dashboard page (/dashboard) renders without errors
No console errors on landing page
test_credentials: No auth required - landing page and dashboard are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: XRP + SOL successfully added to live prices API. Backend uses Kraken API with fallback to static data (BTC $70k, ETH $2k, XRP $2.20, SOL $140). Frontend LivePriceTicker.jsx displays up to 6 coins with overflow-x-auto for mobile scrolling. Landing page layout: navbar (y=0, h=90, z=50) -> ticker (y=92, h=45, z=40) -> hero (y=137). Beta spots remaining=48.

endpoint_2.note: Alias endpoint returns same data as /api/market/live-prices

mocked_api_note: Kraken API falls back to static data in container environment. This is expected behavior per main agent context.
